bead.title: execute-bead: serialize concurrent landings on a per-project land mutex to stop half-landed/clobbered commits

events.body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"root cause and current-state evidence are missing.: The title names one concurrency mechanism, so the scope is singular, but the bead is not executable: the description has no root-cause or current-state evidence and acceptance is blank, with no tests or verification gates.
